layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' Grid for products, structured tables for admin panel

motion_and_interactions.opening_animation: A full-screen black overlay with 'Fashin' in massive white text in center. Text scales down and slides to top-right corner as the background slides up (y: '-100%') revealing the hero section with a smooth stagger effect on elements. Powered by Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale up slightly inside hidden overflow containers (scale: 1.05). Buttons invert colors (bg-white text-black to bg-black text-white with border).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Cart count pop animation on adding. AI Try-On button glows or uses a tracing beam effect.

ui_components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl). 'Fashin' logo MUST be aligned to the TOP RIGHT. Left side for Search, Pincode checker, User Auth, Cart.
ui_components.buttons: Sharp edges, 0px border-radius. High contrast. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-white hover:border-white.
ui_components.cards: Cardless design preferred for products. Use simple grid layouts with image, title, and price. Subtle 1px border-b on hover.
ui_components.ai_try_on_modal: Split screen or slide-over. Left: User's uploaded photo. Right: Product applied via fal.ai. Minimalist controls with sleek sliders or toggle buttons.

specific_features.header_logo_placement: Top Right corner as requested. Override standard left-aligned patterns.
specific_features.pincode_checker: Prominent banner or modal accessible from header to verify 30-min delivery eligibility.
specific_features.payment_integration: Razorpay test mode UI integration for cards/UPI/Netbanking.
specific_features.admin_panel: Dense, functional 'Control Room' grid layout for managing products, orders, and AI try-on assets.

hero.description: High-end fashion model, monochromatic aesthetic, hero visual
Edgy street fashion walking, alternative hero

products.description: Black and white clothes on rack

ai_try_on_references.description: Woman holding sweater in mirror - use for AI Try-On preview/onboarding section
Self portrait for AI feature onboarding

backgrounds_and_textures.description: Black and white abstract texture for section dividers or dark mode accents

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the black, grey, and white color scheme. No accent colors like blue or red; use pure white for accents.
Ensure 'Fashin' is positioned in the top-right corner of the navigation/header across all pages.
Implement the opening animation using Framer Motion before revealing the main layout.
Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for sharp, minimal icons.
For the AI Avatar Try-On, integrate fal.ai endpoints. Design the UI to allow uploading a user photo and mapping it to the selected product.
Incorporate a 30-min delivery tracker UI (progress bar with timestamps).
Integrate Razorpay test credentials for the checkout flow.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Cabinet Grotesk or a similar high-impact Sans-Serif for headings to match the brutalist luxury vibe.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing-focused sections, use Shadcn with 0px border-radius for forms/dashboards/admin.
